title: HeadyTimization
description:
Headytimization is a mod pack that gives the feeling of using optifine without optifine.

Supports 1.20+ and higher versions!
body:
Headytimization is a mod pack that gives the feeling of using optifine without optifine.
Nvidium is included in this modpack to enhance your Minecraft experience. If your Nvidia graphics card does not have the Min:gtx16xx series, nvidium will be disabled automatically.

If you want to play versions 1.20+, check the versions page.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This modpack includes zoom, custom entity models/textures, custom block models/textures, custom item textures, dynamic lights, iris, connected glass/blocks and more!

Why should I download this mod?
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you like Optifine but think it doesn't optimize and you can't leave Optifine, this modpack is for you!

Images!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Up to 64 chunks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87bf9f07ab027c7af7ccb9afd50b4f1b6d9388ed.png)

64 chunk! 300 FPS on normal settings!

Video card: RTX 3070 TI

Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 2600 Six-Core Processor
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
![8 chunk + normal pc. Bad pc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/596d887a48af025f6948f8392b00674adba3a09d.png)
8 chunk! 60 fps on normal settings!

Video card: Intel HD Graphics 500 2 GB VRAM

Processor: Intel Celeron N3350 1.10 GHZ
_________________________________________________________________________________________________

Not:Beta versions may not be as optimized as the full version or some features may not be available!

I plan to add AMDium as soon as it comes out!
